features: Hydrating: With added pro-vitamin B5, Astonish shampoo hydrates and rejuvenates hair
For everyone: Astonish shampoo is dermatologically tested and suitable for a range of hair types
Fruity Fragrance: The peach scent will leave hair smelling tropical all day long
Fully-recyclable: Good for your hair and the environment, encased in 100% recyclable packaging
Vegan & Cruelty Free: At Astonish, we are proud that all our products are 100% vegan and completely animal cruelty free, giving you peace of mind
description: Product Description Here at Astonish we are proud of our products. Whatever your cleaning problem we aim to have a helpful cleaning solution even personal care. Now we‚Äôre not saying that we can work miracles, let‚Äôs be realistic cleaning can on occasions be hard work, but we‚Äôve taken the time to ensure we‚Äôve developed products that get the job done right, nothing less. Astonish Tropical Shampoo is a hair-care staple for all hair types. With added pro-vitamin B5, it hydrates and rejuvenates hair, giving you that fresh hair feeling. The fragrant notes of fresh peaches leave a delightful, long-lasting aroma from root to tip. Rejuvenate all hair types with Astonish Tropical Shampoo. With added pro-vitamin B5, this shampoo hydrates hair and leaves it smelling of peaches. Ingredients Sodium Laureth Sulfate, Sodium Benzoate, Glycerol, etrasodium N,Nbis(carboxylatomethyl)-L-glutamate, Linalool, gamma-Undecalactone, Ethylene dodecanedioate, Benzyl acetate, 2,6-dimethyloct-7-en-2-ol, Allylcyclohexanepropionate, Allyl Heptylate, 4-Methyl-3-decen-5-ol, Tartrazine 400%, alpha-Pinene, Allyl hexanoate, Gamma-Terpinene, dl-Citronellol, Citral, Geraniol, Benzyl salicylate Directions Apply to wet hair, massage into a lather, rinse thoroughly. Safety Warning Inhalation: remove to fresh air. Eye contact: rinse thoroughly with plenty of water for at least 15 minutes, lifting lower and upper eyelids. Consult a physician. Skin contact: wash skin with soap and water. In the case of skin irritation or allergic reactions see a physician. Ingestion: rinse mouth. Manufacturer Contact Information Manufactured by: The London Oil Refining Co. Ltd., Bradford, BD3 7AF, UK. EU by: Advena Ltd., Tower Business Centre, 2nd Floor, Tower Street, Swatar, BKR 4013, Malta.
